info.description: Horse line-up fields aligned with history.finish-placing, excluding result-only fields (position, time, margin). Win odds: local results page (past); bet.hkjc WP when only racecard is available.

jockeyId.description: HKJC jockey id from profile URL

trainerId.description: HKJC trainer id from profile URL

winOdds.description: Starting win odds (decimal) from HKJC local results for past races, or from bet.hkjc WP when using racecard only
